rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHRIS V. MIGUEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Mation And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents,
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, June 12, 2008. 1)Petitioner Ruth Lewis's motion to compel responses from John Miguel as to: a) Form interrogatories (#1) b) Request for production of documents (#1) c) Request for production of documents (#2) Granted. Respondent shall serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. 2) Petitioner's motion to compel responses from Rosita Miguel Carey as to: a) Form interrogatories (#1) b) Request for production of documents (#1) c) Request for production of documents (#2) Granted. Respondent shall serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. 3) Petitioner's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted (#1 as to John Miguel and Rosita Miguel Carey) Granted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $780 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
